## Summary

What does this PR do? Link the issue it closes if applicable (`Closes #N`).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Changes to security-sensitive code?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes — touches `freeq-crypto`, `freeq-auth`, or the handshake protocol

> Security-sensitive PRs require two maintainer approvals. Please add a brief explanation of the security implications below.

## Testing

How did you test this? What should reviewers verify?

- [ ] `cargo test --all` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes

## CLA

- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md and signed the CLA (automated on PR submission via CLA Assistant)

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that would help the reviewer understand the context or approach.
